content.text: WarningIf statementsonly conditionally execute a single statement. We talk about how to conditionally execute multiple statements in lesson8.2 -- If statements and blocks.
If statementsonly conditionally execute a single statement. We talk about how to conditionally execute multiple statements in lesson8.2 -- If statements and blocks.

content.text: Key insightif (x)means “if x is non-zero/non-empty”.
if (x)means “if x is non-zero/non-empty”.

You never need an if-statement of the form:if (condition)
  return true;
else
  return false;This can be replaced by the single statementreturn condition.
This can be replaced by the single statementreturn condition.
